CustomField.formula: IF (AND(Teams_Channel_1__c !='',Name_for_Team_Channel1__c !=''), HYPERLINK( Teams_Channel_1__c ,Name_for_Team_Channel1__c), IF(AND(Teams_Channel_1__c ='', Name_for_Team_Channel1__c !=''), 'Please paste a Teams Link into Teams Channel 1', IF(AND(Teams_Channel_1__c !='',Name_for_Team_Channel1__c =''), HYPERLINK( Teams_Channel_1__c ,"Channel Link") , '')))
CustomField.label: Project Team Channel
